botEmail.description: The bot's email address in Zulip

botApiKey.description: The bot's API key from Zulip

dmLimit.description: How many recent DM messages to consider for prompt context (default: 30)

streamLimit.description: How many recent topic messages to consider for prompt context (default: 40)

attachmentLookback.description: How many earlier messages to scan for referenced attachments (default: 12)

maxMessageChars.description: Per-message history cap before context injection (default: 1200)

maxTotalChars.description: Total history char budget before the current Zulip message (default: 24000)

includeTimestamps.description: Whether to include ISO timestamps in injected history context (default: true)

allowFrom.description: Email addresses allowed to DM the bot (used with allowlist/dm-allowlist policies)

allowed.description: Stream names to monitor (used with allowlist policy)

replyPolicy.description: When to reply in streams (default: dm-allowlist)
